current_entries.en_definition: (game of go) An empty space next to a group of stones of the same color.

examples.english: Liberty consists of being able to make everything as harmless as possible.
examples.chinese: 自由旨在能够做所有不伤害其他人的事。

current_entries.en_definition: An identifying tag, usually made of metal, bearing a sequence of letters or numbers identifying the vehicle, and placed at the rear and, often, also at the front of a motor vehicle.
(legal) Explicitly established or constituted by law.
(colloquial, negative polarity) A small amount; a whit.
(transitive) To lap; to take in with the tongue.
(colloquial, dated) To defeat decisively, particularly in a fight.
(intransitive) To assume a horizontal position.
(UK, Australia, New Zealand, India, puristic, _, elsewhere) Mechanical device for vertically transporting goods or people between floors in a building.

examples.english: Let me give you a lift as far as the station.
examples.chinese: 讓我送你到車站吧。

current_entries.en_definition: Permanent construction with a built-in platform that is lifted vertically.
To try to raise something; to exert the strength for raising or bearing.
An evacuated glass bulb containing a metal filament which is heated by electrical resistance to produce light.
(by extension) An article that resembles such a bulb and converts electricity to light by any process.
Joyful, glad, taking pleasure in being alive; not depressed or sad.
Enjoyably lacking of seriousness, not grave.
(manner) In a similar manner.

examples.english: Tom is tall and likewise strong.
examples.chinese: 汤姆又高又壮。

current_entries.en_definition: The same to you; used as a response.
A product or a set of related products that serve a particular customer transaction or business need.
Descent in a line from a common progenitor; progeny; descending line of offspring or ascending line of parentage.
(intransitive) To stay or remain in a place or situation, especially as if unwilling to depart or not easily able to do so.

A common language used by people of diverse backgrounds to communicate with one another, often a basic form of speech with simplified grammar, particularly, one that is not the first language of any of its speakers.
A covering for the inside surface of something.

examples.english: Every cloud has a silver lining.
examples.chinese: 每朵雲都披著銀衣。

current_entries.en_definition: (in particular) A male lion, as opposed to a lioness, which is characterized by having a flowing shaggy mane and taking little part in hunting, which can be done cooperatively.

examples.english: The lion is the king of beasts.
examples.chinese: 獅子是百獸之王。

current_entries.en_definition: A big cat, Panthera leo, native to Africa, India and formerly much of Europe.
A person who shows attributes associated with the lion, such as strength, courage, or ferocity.
A liquid obtained by cooking meat or vegetables (or both).
(chiefly, US, Canada, Australia) Strong alcoholic drink derived from fermentation and distillation; more broadly, any alcoholic drink.

(intransitive, _, except in archaic usage) To use one's sense of hearing and auditory cognition in an intentional way; to make deliberate use of one's ears; to pay attention to or wait for a specific sound.

examples.english: Don't listen to him, he's talking nonsense.
examples.chinese: 別聽他的, 他在說廢話。

current_entries.en_definition: The simplest alkali metal, the lightest solid element, and the third lightest chemical element (symbol Li) with an atomic number of 3 and atomic weight of 6.94. It is a soft, silvery metal.
The metric unit of fluid measure, equal to one cubic decimetre. Symbol: L, l, or ℓ.
A term of endearment, especially toward a child.
The chemical element with atomic number 116 (symbol Lv).
(archaic, _, except in the phrase lo and behold) look, see, behold (in an imperative sense).

examples.english: We have pilaf, lo mein, and kebabs in our restaurant.
examples.chinese: 在我们的饭店抓饭，拌面，烤肉串都有。

current_entries.en_definition: An idle person.

(law, banking, finance) A sum of money or other property that a natural or legal person borrows from another with the condition that it be returned or repaid over time or at a later date (sometimes with interest).

examples.english: You can get a loan from a bank.
examples.chinese: 你可以从银行贷款。

current_entries.en_definition: (usually, _, ditransitive, US, dated, _, and) To lend (something) to (someone).
(transitive) To detest, hate, or revile (someone or something).
Any projection or division, especially one of a somewhat rounded form. [from Template:SAFESUBST: c.]
(Ireland, Scotland) A bay or arm of the sea.
To blockade and lock (e.g. a building or campus) so as to prevent ingress or egress; to make the occupants (of an area) stay locked indoors for their safety.
(transitive) To fix the value of (something potentially variable).
(transitive) To imprison or incarcerate (someone).
(intransitive) To close (and often lock) all doors and windows (of a place) securely.
A place or locality, especially a centre of activity or the scene of a crime.
(mathematics) The set of all points whose coordinates satisfy a given equation or condition.
(by extension) A rich source of supply.
A building for recreational use such as a hunting lodge or a summer cabin.
Ellipsis of porter's lodge: a building or room near the entrance of an estate or building, especially (UK, Canada) as a college mailroom.
A local chapter of some fraternities, such as freemasons.
(transitive) To supply with a room or place to sleep in for a time.
(transitive) To cause to flatten, as grass or grain.
High, tall, having great height or stature.
(slang) A lazy person, one who lollygags; a slacker, ne'er-do-well.
Unhappy due to feeling isolated from contact with other people.
(of a, place or time) Unfrequented by people; desolate.
At a time in the past, especially the distant past.
(idiomatic) Old; aged.
A weekend extended by one or more days off falling on a day or days immediately preceding or following it.
Having existed for a long time; of long standing.
A large bow that has a strong tension, and is usually more than 3 feet tall. The most famous longbows in history were the English longbows, which were crafted of yew.
(transitive) To seek.
One's appearance or attractiveness.

examples.english: This looks pretty interesting, Hiroshi says.
examples.chinese: “这看上去很有意思。”Hiroshi说道。

current_entries.en_definition: To forget one's train of thought or temporarily misplace an item or its place in a sequence.
A slip of paper drawn in a lottery, possibly redeemable for a prize.
A kind of aquatic plant, genus Nelumbo in the family Nelumbonaceae.
A small parasitic wingless insect of the order Psocodea.

examples.english: The plural form of "louse" is "lice".
examples.chinese: “虱子”的复数形式是“虱子们”

current_entries.en_definition: (colloquial, dated, not usually used in plural form) A contemptible person; one who is deceitful or causes harm.
A part of something which sticks out, used as a handle or support.
(transitive, sometimes, figurative) To haul or drag along (especially something heavy); to carry; to pull.
One who is an inspiration to others; one who has achieved success in one's chosen field; a leading light.
(archaic) A body that gives light; especially, one of the heavenly bodies.
Emitting light; glowing brightly; shining.
To put different items or groups together and regard or treat them as one single group (either knowingly or unknowingly, and either advisedly or unadvisedly).
(anatomy) A biological organ of vertebrates that controls breathing and oxygenates the blood.

examples.english: Smokers are far more likely to develop lung cancer than non-smokers are.
examples.chinese: 吸煙的人患上肺癌的風險比不吸煙的人高得多。

current_entries.en_definition: (constellation) A summer constellation of the southern sky, said to resemble a wolf. It lies south of the constellation Libra.
(pathology) Any of a number of autoimmune diseases, the most common of which is systemic lupus erythematosus.
A chemical element (symbol Lu) with an atomic number of 71, a silvery-white metal which resists corrosion in dry air.
(colloquial) The landlady of a theater.

examples.english: Lao Gan Ma and I have a love-hate relationship.
examples.chinese: 我和老干妈有爱恨交加的关系。

current_entries.en_definition: A ceremonial form of this weapon.
(chiefly, British Isles) Insane; crazy, mentally deranged.

examples.english: For a moment there, I thought he had gone mad.
examples.chinese: 一时间我还以为他疯了。

current_entries.en_definition: (chiefly, US; informal in UK and Ireland) Angry, annoyed.
The state of being mad; insanity; mental disease.

examples.english: Anger is a form of madness.
examples.chinese: 生气是一种疯狂的形态。

current_entries.en_definition: A soft, legless larva of a fly or other dipterous insect, that often eats decomposing organic matter. [from 15th c.]
(slang, derogatory) A worthless person. [from 17th c.]
The chemical element with an atomic number of 12. It is a light, easily flammable, silvery-white alkaline earth metal.
(physics) The property of being magnetic.

examples.english: An electric current can generate magnetism.
examples.chinese: 電流可以產生磁性。

current_entries.en_definition: (chiefly, British) The domestic electrical power supply, especially as connected to a network or grid.

examples.english: The water mains burst due to the earthquake.
examples.chinese: 一條主要水管被地震震裂了。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To discern; to manage to see, hear etc. [from 16th c.]
(now, chiefly, US, regional, intransitive) To manage, get along; to do (well, badly etc.). [from 17th c.]
(slang, chiefly, US, intransitive) To embrace and kiss passionately. [from 20th c.]
Anas platyrhynchos, a common and widespread dabbling duck, natively found throughout the Northern Hemisphere, whose male has a distinctive dark green head.
(music) A small hammer-like tool used for playing certain musical instruments.
(transitive) To direct or be in charge of.
(transitive) To handle or control (a situation, job).
(ambitransitive) To achieve (something) without fuss, or without outside help.
Standard Mandarin, an official language of China and Taiwan, and one of four official languages in Singapore; Putonghua, Guoyu or Huayu.

examples.english: This isn't Mandarin, it's Shanghainese.
examples.chinese: 这不是普通话，而是上海话。

current_entries.en_definition: (historical) A high government bureaucrat of the Chinese Empire. [from 1580s]
A small citrus tree (Citrus reticulata) with oblate fruits smaller than the (so-named) sweet oranges.
The fruit of this tree; in loose, informal usage, the term may include other similar citrus fruits such as Citrus unshiu (satsuma or mikan).
The jaw or a jawbone, especially the lower jawbone in mammals and fishes.
One of the anterior pair of mouthparts of an arthropod, designed for holding and cutting food.
A metallic chemical element (symbol Mn) with an atomic number of 25, not a free element in nature but often found in minerals in combination with iron, and useful in industrial alloy production.
A trough in a stable or barn for animals to eat from.
A tree of the genus Acer, characterised by its usually palmate leaves and winged seeds.

examples.english: Could you pass me the maple syrup?
examples.chinese: 能把楓糖漿遞給我嗎？

current_entries.en_definition: Bordering on the sea; living near the seacoast; coastal.
A man or person skilled at hitting targets, as with a firearm, bow, or thrown object.
The substance inside bones which produces blood cells.
Any member of the raptor genus Circus of similar appearance and habit to Circus aeruginosus.
Any carnivorous mammal of the genus Martes.
A thesis submitted for a master's degree.
Lacking emotion or color.
(heraldiccharge) A long stylised sleeve.
(archaic) The stomach, especially of an animal.
(skeleton) Either of the two bones that lie with one on each side of the upper jaw lateral to the premaxilla and that in higher vertebrates bear most of the teeth.
Food that is prepared and eaten, usually at a specific time, and usually in a comparatively large quantity (as opposed to a snack).

examples.english: Enjoy your meal!
examples.chinese: 祝你胃口好！

current_entries.en_definition: The ground-up edible part of various grains, used as a basis of food or feed; either flour or a coarser blend than flour (usage varies).
Resembling meal (the foodstuff).
Of, relating to, or containing meat.
A medicine, or all the medicines regularly taken by a patient.
Tending or used to cure disease or relieve pain.
Having a medium or intermediate size.
(anatomy) The inner substance of various organs and structures, especially the marrow of bones.
A flatfish of the genus Lepidorhombus native to the northeastern Atlantic Ocean; specifically, a Cornish sole, sail-fluke, witch or whiff (Lepidorhombus whiffiagonis).
A transuranic chemical element (symbol Mt) with atomic number 109.
One who belongs to a group.

examples.english: Each member has to pay 10,000 yen a month.
examples.chinese: 每位会员每月需支付一万日元。

current_entries.en_definition: Part of an animal capable of performing a distinct office; an organ; a limb.
(euphemism) The penis.
To fully learn so as to have entirely available to the memory; to learn by heart, commit to memory.
(chemistry) A transuranic chemical element (symbol Md, formerly Mv) with atomic number 101.
A Chinese surname from Mandarin.
(focus) Without any other reason etc.; only, just, and nothing more. [from 16th c.]

(architectural element, military, historical) Any of the upright projections between the embrasures of a battlement, originally for archers to shield behind while shooting arrows over the embrasures, or through loopholes in the merlons.
(colloquial) To diss; to put down.
(transitive) To distribute something in portions; to apportion or dole out.

The basic unit of length in the International System of Units (SI: Système International d'Unités), equal to the distance travelled by light in a vacuum in 1/299 792 458 seconds. The metre is equal to 39+47⁄127 (approximately 39.37) imperial inches.
(chiefly, _, US) A unit of mass equal to 1000 kilograms, about 2204.6 pounds avoirdupois.
(music) A syllable used in sol-fa (solfège) to represent the third note of a major scale.
The middle of the air, as while in flight.

Any of various small two-winged flies, for example, from the family Chironomidae or non-biting midges, the family Chaoboridae or phantom midges, and the family Ceratopogonidae or biting midges, all belonging to the order Diptera.
(anatomy) The middle section of the human torso, from below the chest to above the waist; the abdomen and its back part.
(often, literary) A place in the middle of something; may be used of a literal or metaphorical location.
(dated, of a mammal) Currently producing milk for its offspring.
(specifically) A social environment or setting.
Resembling milk in color, consistency, smell, etc.; consisting of milk.
The semen of a male fish.
(transitive) To intermix; to combine or join, as an individual or part, with other parts, but commonly so as to be distinguishable in the product.
An angle, one sixtieth (1/60th) of a degree, used by gunners as a measurement of accuracy. One minute of angle is roughly equal to 1 inch at 100 yards distance.
Consisting of a variety of ingredients or parts.
An assortment of miscellaneous items.

examples.english: Only if you put up a different sign can you become a miscellany store.
examples.chinese: 只要換上不同招牌，就能成為各種商店。

current_entries.en_definition: A collection of writings on various subjects or topics; an anthology.
That which was done that should not have been, ranging from any sin or moral offense to various degrees of crime.
(formal) A written message; a letter, note or memo.
Any of many minute arachnids which, along with the ticks, comprise subclass Acarina (aka Acari).
A deep, wide defensive ditch, normally filled with water, surrounding a fortified habitation.
Imitation, not genuine; fake.

current_entries.en_definition: An imitation, usually of lesser quality.
Mockery; the act of mocking.
To mimic, to simulate.
(mathematics) Given a specified modulus of.
A share or portion, especially a smaller share.
Characterized by the presence of moisture; not dry; slightly wet; damp. [from 14th c.]

current_entries.en_definition: (architecture) A plane, or curved, narrow surface, either sunk or projecting, used for decoration by means of the lights and shades upon its surface and to conceal joints, especially between unlike materials.
A chemical element (symbol Mo) with an atomic number of 42: a silvery metal, not found as a free element, used in steel alloys.
Of, pertaining to, or consisting of money.

Any of several species of generalist predatory carnivores in the family Herpestidae; the various species range in size from rats to large cats. Indian mongooses are predators of venomous snakes, though other mongoose species have similar habits.
(astronomy, geology) An extraterrestrial mountain or volcano.
(informal) Money, cash.
(informal) Behaving in the manner of a moron; idiotic; stupid.
A small fragment or share of something, commonly applied to food.
Causing death; deadly, fatal, killing, lethal (now only of wounds, injuries etc.). [from 14th c.]

examples.english: The flesh is mortal.
examples.chinese: 肉體終有一死。

current_entries.en_definition: Affecting as if with power to kill; deathly.
A human; someone susceptible to death.
(transitive) To discipline (one's body, appetites etc.) by suppressing desires; to practise abstinence on. [from 15th c.]
The chemical element with atomic number 115.
On most occasions; usually.
Any flying insect of the order Lepidoptera not in the superfamily Papilionoidea, most species of which are nocturnal and can be distinguished from butterflies by feather-like antennae.

examples.english: Is it a butterfly or a moth?

current_entries.en_definition: (vulgar) An intensifier, used in the same contexts as fucking, but more intense.
(obsolete) A rider in a cavalry unit or division.
(obsolete, transitive) To cause (something) to rise or ascend; to drive up; to raise; to elevate; to lift up.
(intransitive, sometimes, with up) To increase in quantity or intensity.
(transitive) To have or begin sexual intercourse with someone.
The amount that will fit in a mouth.

examples.english: She gulped down half her tea in one mouthful.

current_entries.en_definition: (folk medicine) The burning of moxa against the skin to treat pain or illness.
a title used for a married couple before the surname or before the name of the husband.

Abbreviation of Missus or Mistress; used before an adult woman's name or surname, used for any high-status woman without regard to marital status until the 1800s, after which it began to be reserved for married, divorced and widowed women and used with their married surnames.
The 12th letter of the Modern Greek alphabet.

examples.english: Mu shu pork is my speciality.

current_entries.en_definition: A mixture; a confusion; a garble.

current_entries.en_definition: A large indeterminate number.

Any of various species of east Asian deer of the genus Muntiacus, having short antlers and a barking call.
Nonuniformity in the luminance of a display device.
Hard to see through, as a fog or mist.
(by extension) Dishonest, shady.
(relational) Of, relating to, or connected with muscles.
Resembling or having the consistency of mush; semiliquid, pasty, or granular.
Any carnivorous mammal of the diverse weasel family Mustelidae, which also includes badgers, otters, martens, mink and wolverines.
An assemblage or display; a gathering, collection of people or things. [from 14th c.]
(military) An assembling or review of troops, as for parade, verification of numbers, inspection, exercise, or introduction into service. [from 15th c.]
(obsolete) An act of showing something; a display. [15th–17th c.]
(obsolete) Something shown for imitation; a pattern. [15th–19th c.]
(intransitive) To be gathered together for parade, inspection, exercise, or the like (especially of a military force); to come together as parts of a force or body. [from 15th c.]
Having the same relationship, each to each other.
Reciprocal.
Possessed in common.
The protruding part of an animal's head which includes the nose, mouth and jaws.

Personally, for my part; used in apposition to I, sometimes for simple emphasis and sometimes with implicit exclusion of any others performing the activity described. [from 10th c.]

examples.english: I'd be unhappy, but I wouldn't kill myself.
examples.chinese: 我会不高兴，但我不会自杀。

current_entries.en_definition: (proscribed) Me, as the object of a verb or preposition without a reflexive trigger. Sometimes used for intensifying the pronoun of oneself. [from 10th c.]
(anatomy) The back part of the neck.
A white crystalline hydrocarbon manufactured from coal tar; used in mothballs.
(Christianity) A depiction—which may be pictorial, dramatic, or by means of figurines—of the birth of Jesus Christ in a manger, as described in the New Testament account.
(archaic) Nothingness.

Free from contaminants; unadulterated, undiluted. Particularly of liquor and cocktails; see usage below.
(chemistry) Conditions with a liquid reagent or gas performed with no standard solvent or cosolvent.

Well-executed or delivered; clever, skillful, precise.
(North American, colloquial) Good, excellent, desirable; interesting; cool.
(archaic) Cattle collectively.
Sinful, villainous, criminal, or wicked, especially when noteworthy or notorious for such characteristics.
(dated, now, offensive) Relating to a black ethnicity.
(dated, now, offensive) Black or dark brown in color.
(dated, now, offensive) A person of black African ancestry.

A form or sample of the element.
The transuranic chemical element with atomic number 93 and symbol Np.

Pleasantly; satisfactorily. [from 18th c.]
(archaic, poetic) Near, close by.
Almost, nearly.
near; close to

examples.english: I work in the nighttime.

The chemical element (symbol N) with an atomic number of 7 and atomic weight of 14.0067. It is a colorless and odorless gas.

examples.english: The air we breathe consists of oxygen and nitrogen.

Used in contrast to anyone, someone or everyone: not one person; nobody.
a transuranic chemical element (symbol No) with an atomic number of 102.

Not, the negation of the root word (a quality).

(emphatic) Not even a tiny bit; not in any way.

Introduces or constitutes a more emphatic negation or exclusion than "not".
A mountain pass; a defile.

(philosophy) The state of nonexistence; the condition of being nothing.
A void; an emptiness.
The quality of inconsequentiality; the lack of significance.

examples.english: I will notify you of the arrival of the goods.

(modifying a numeral, one to twelve) In conjunction with a numeral, indicates the time within a twelve-hour period (midnight to noon or noon to midnight), specifically the time when the hour hand of a clock points precisely to the symbol or marking corresponding to the designated numeral, i.e., at the hour.

examples.english: You must come back before nine o'clock.
examples.chinese: 你必须在九点之前回来。

current_entries.en_definition: A type of lever used to propel a boat, having a flat blade at one end and a handle at the other, and pivoted in a rowlock atop the gunwale, whereby a rower seated in the boat and pulling the handle can pass the blade through the water by repeated strokes against the water's resistance, thus moving the boat.

The state of being completely forgotten, of being reduced to a state of non-existence, extinction, or nothingness, including through war and destruction. (Figuratively) for an area like hell, a wasteland.
(usually, with to or of) Lacking awareness; unmindful; unaware, unconscious of.
Dark, faint or indistinct.

current_entries.en_definition: Hidden, out of sight or inconspicuous.

(literary) Darkness; the absence of light.
(of words, equipment, etc.) No longer in use; gone into disuse; disused or neglected (often in favour of something newer).
The heads side of a coin, or the side of a medal or badge that has the principal design.
(intransitive) To happen or take place.

examples.english: Bright ideas never occur to me.
examples.chinese: 我總想不出什麼好點子。

current_entries.en_definition: (intransitive) To present or offer itself.
(intransitive, sciences) To be present or found.
(architecture) A window or other opening that has an oval or circular shape (as of an eye).
Temporary employment.
(countable, and, uncountable, biology) A female animal's readiness to mate.
(colloquial) With regard to income, undeclared for taxes and social insurance purposes, etc.
The internal organs of an animal (entrails or innards), used as food.

The chemical element (symbol Og) with atomic number 118. It is the heaviest known element. Highly radioactive, it does not occur naturally. Originally expected to be a noble gas, it is now predicted to be a reactive metallic solid, and a semiconductor or a post-transition metal.
(transitive, intransitive) To stare at (someone or something), especially impertinently, amorously, or covetously.
Expression of surprise.

examples.english: Oh, there's a butterfly!
examples.chinese: 哦！有一隻蝴蝶！

current_entries.en_definition: the digit 0 (especially in representations of speech)
A painting done with oil paints.
(endearing, or, patronizing) old woman
(biology, food) The third compartment of the stomach of a ruminant; the lining of said compartment, regarded as a foodstuff.
(idiomatic) Consistent with one's reputation, perhaps to a stereotypical degree.
(idiomatic) Again, once more, one more time.
Belonging to one.

examples.english: To share one's passion is to live it fully.
examples.chinese: 分享激情，就是完全沉浸在里面。

current_entries.en_definition: Occurring or used in a single instance and then never again.
Having lived or existed for one year.
Of or pertaining to dreams.
Imposing or constituting a physical, mental, or figurative load which can be borne only with effort; burdensome.
Arriving upon or on top of (speaking of a physical or metaphorical movement).
(informal, uncountable) Sex appeal.
Allowing little light to pass through, not translucent or transparent.
(figuratively) Obtuse, stupid.
(obsolete, poetic) An area of darkness; a place or region with no light.
(intransitive) To reveal oneself; to share personal information about oneself; to become communicative.
To speak passionately; to preach for or against something.
A plant of the orchid family (Orchidaceae), bearing unusually-shaped flowers of beautiful colours. [mid-19th c.]
A chemical element (symbol Os) with atomic number 76: a hard, brittle, heavy, bluish-white transition metal found as a trace element in alloys, mostly in platinum ores.
Of, relating to, or made of bone; bony.
(ornithology) A large flightless bird of the order Struthioniformes.

examples.english: That's why ostrich meat costs more than twice as much as beef and pork.
examples.chinese: 這就是駝鳥肉比牛肉和豬肉貴兩倍多的原因了。

current_entries.en_definition: Not in the correct musical pitch.
Outside; external.

examples.english: How do you find food in outer space?
examples.chinese: 你怎么在太空里找到食物？

current_entries.en_definition: A vent or similar passage to allow the escape of something.

examples.english: I spilled jam on the electric outlet and there was a short circuit.
examples.chinese: 我把果酱撒到电源插座上短路了。

current_entries.en_definition: Something which allows for the release of one's desires.
A shop that sells the products of a particular manufacturer or supplier.
(computing) Data sent out of the computer, as to output device such as a monitor or printer, or data sent from one program on the computer to another.
(computing) To send data out of a computer, as to an output device such as a monitor or printer, or to send data from one program on the computer to another.
An onset; the beginning or initial stage of something. [from 1759]
(idiomatic) Of a person, old, past the prime of life.
(transitive) To change or affect so as to pervade (something); to come over
(sometimes, proscribed) To an excessive degree.
To pass a slower moving object or entity (on the side closest to oncoming traffic).

examples.english: Where did you overtake them?
examples.chinese: 你在哪裡超過了他們？

current_entries.en_definition: To take by surprise; surprise and overcome; carry away.
To overpower emotionally.

Any of various birds of prey of the order Strigiformes, families Strigidae and Tytonidae, that are primarily nocturnal and have forward-looking, binocular vision, limited eye movement, and good hearing. [from 8th c.]

examples.english: I'm a night owl.
examples.chinese: 我是個夜貓子。

current_entries.en_definition: Any moth of the family Noctuidae.
One who owns something.

examples.english: Who is the owner of this house?
examples.chinese: 誰是這間房子的主人？

current_entries.en_definition: An adult castrated male of cattle (B. taurus), especially when used as a beast of burden.
The chemical element (symbol O) with an atomic number of 8 and relative atomic mass of 15.9994. It is a colorless and odorless gas.

examples.english: We yawn when we are short of oxygen.
examples.chinese: 我们缺氧时就会打哈欠。

current_entries.en_definition: Molecular oxygen (O2), a colorless, odorless gas at room temperature, also called dioxygen.
(euphemistic) An interjection in response to smelling an unpleasant scent.
